error_signature: Wait node fails on long intervals
title: Wait node fails on long intervals in v2.6.4
symptom: The Wait node in n8n stops and never resumes when set to 5 minutes. No errors are logged, and it stays in 'Waiting' status indefinitely.
not_this_if: Using short intervals (e.g., 1 minute) for Wait node
root_cause: The issue arises from the `X-Forwarded-For` header validation introduced in v2.6.4, which blocks internal webhooks used by the Wait node for longer durations. This is due to stricter rate-limiting validation requiring explicit trust of proxy headers when running behind a reverse proxy.
fix_steps: Add the environment variables N8N_PROXY_TRUST_ALL: 'true' and N8N_METRICS: 'true' to your Docker configuration.
agent_instruction: Add the required environment variables to the Docker configuration and restart the container.
